steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request refund of EUR 3,607.50 excess withholding tax on Nokia Oyj dividend due to incorrect 13.5% rate applied instead of treaty rate 15%
Submit Finnish tax refund application using Form 6163e + 6167e citing Finland-Norway tax treaty Article 10 allowing 15% maximum withholding
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement which should have enabled direct application of 15% rate for Norwegian residents

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
